subcategory: AI chat textarea with auto-resize and animated placeholder
use_cases: AI chatbot message composition with auto-expanding textarea
Search interface with animated contextual placeholder
Text input with attachment and send actions for AI assistants
ai_summary: An auto-resizing AI input component with animated placeholder that transitions between 'Ask Skiper Ai...' and 'Search the web...' states. Features a custom useAutoResizeTextarea hook, Framer Motion animations, and action buttons for attachments and sending messages. Supports dark mode with Tailwind classes and includes keyboard-friendly textarea integration.
